provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, adorable small dragon creature with big sparkly eyes and tiny wings and pink pastel scales, wearing a cute little crown and a tiny cape with stars on it, sitting in a cheerful pose with a happy smile, the creature is designed to sell plush toys not to be a member of a warrior civilization with its own deep cultural identity, everything about it undermines the Veshan as a serious species

judgment.explanation: Adorable small dragon with sparkly eyes, tiny wings, pink pastel scales, cute crown and cape with stars. Mascot toy not warrior civilization member.
